Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2019 Continued To Feb-20-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Laurence Vinocur's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant American Exchange Time LLC is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and judgment signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)
